records.summary: Composite multi-input quality score used as a gating signal before committing to one processing path.
records.dejargonized_summary: Combine waveform evidence and detector agreement into one reusable quality summary that can decide whether a fixed downstream path is trustworthy.

heuristic.dejargonized_meaning: Local quality changes enough that one fixed path may be brittle and a gate or alternate branch may be needed.

provenance_notes: This score combines waveform evidence with agreement between two event extraction views.
The output is suitable as a cross-family gate because it summarizes whether one fixed processing route looks brittle for the current window.
uncertainty_notes: A single quality score should guide routing or validation, not replace direct inspection of downstream failure modes.

references.title: BioSPPy ECG SQI implementation
references.citation: Primary upstream implementation for the ZZ2018 composite quality score.
references.note: Source-backed metadata for a reusable quality heuristic producer.

references.title: Zhao et al. 2018 ECG SQI paper
references.citation: Exact attribution for the upstream composite scoring method.

uncertainty_notes: Composite quality scores summarize several cues and should be interpreted as gating evidence rather than direct correctness proof.

records.summary: Frequency-ratio score that measures whether nuisance structure is dominating the useful content.
records.dejargonized_summary: Estimate whether the current representation is still dominated by unwanted repeating structure that should be filtered or replaced before later stages trust it.

heuristic.dejargonized_meaning: The current conditioning stage leaves too much nuisance structure relative to the useful content.

provenance_notes: The score is based on how much power remains in expected versus nuisance ranges of the transformed representation.
It supports stage replacement or extra conditioning when nuisance structure still dominates.
uncertainty_notes: This metric is informative about remaining nuisance structure, but the exact threshold remains family-local.

references.title: BioSPPy ECG SQI implementation
references.citation: Primary upstream implementation for the frequency-power quality score.

uncertainty_notes: A poor score indicates a likely conditioning issue, not necessarily that the entire family is invalid.

records.summary: Agreement score between two event extractors that surfaces structural alignment problems.
records.dejargonized_summary: Compare two extraction views of the same stream to estimate whether downstream stages are relying on event boundaries that do not line up well enough.

heuristic.dejargonized_meaning: The current stage boundaries or outputs are not aligned with what the downstream stage expects.

provenance_notes: Agreement is measured between two extraction views of the same input stream.
Low agreement supports validation or stage replacement because downstream stages may be consuming misaligned boundaries.
uncertainty_notes: Low extractor agreement can reflect either true alignment problems or two weak extractors failing together.

references.title: BioSPPy ECG SQI implementation
references.citation: Primary upstream implementation for the beat-agreement quality score.

uncertainty_notes: Agreement should be interpreted as structural evidence, not as ground truth about the extracted events.
